name: bot-012-news-structure
description: Turn a news announcement (pasted text OR a URL) into a faithful, structured NewsDoc for video. Use this FIRST whenever the user gives a press release, announcement, headline + body, or a news/blog link and wants it presented as a video. Extracts the headline, dek, key facts, a quote, a stat, the dateline and source, picks 1-3 highlight phrases, and recommends a style — writing 01-newsdoc.md (human) and newsdoc.json (the render contract). It NEVER fabricates facts — every field traces to the input or is null.

inputs.name: announcement-text
inputs.description: Pasted headline and/or body of the announcement. One of text/url is required.

inputs.name: source-url
inputs.description: A URL to the announcement; fetched + readability-extracted. One of text/url is required.

inputs.name: highlight-hints
inputs.description: Optional phrases the user wants emphasized; otherwise the skill picks 1-3.

outputs.name: newsdoc-human
outputs.description: Human-readable structured story for the user to review before rendering.

outputs.name: newsdoc-machine
outputs.description: The NewsDoc — the read-only contract consumed by bot-012-news-video.

outputs.name: raw-input
outputs.description: The verbatim pasted text or fetched extract + URL, saved unchanged.
